summary: 2 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Error#404

film.title: The Tutor
film.talent: Mia McKenna-Bruce, Alex Hassell (voice cast); Rosie Day (writer/creator)
film.announcement: Audible Original thriller adds voice cast Mia McKenna-Bruce and Alex Hassell.

tv.title: Blue Murder Motel
tv.announcement: Acorn TV and ITV acquire kiwi cozy crime drama.

tv.title: Dept. Q
tv.announcement: Season 2 adds new cast and begins production.

tv.title: Hamburg Days
tv.talent: Asa Butterfield, Jonny Lee Miller, Christine Tremarco
tv.announcement: Beatles drama adds cast including Asa Butterfield, Jonny Lee Miller, and Christine Tremarco.
